title: chrysodium alienum
intro_study: According to "Evidence-based complementary and alternative medicine : eCAM", chrysodium alienum (also known as Stevia aristata) benefits include exerting a marked effect in reducing the viability of protoscoleces of E. granulosus, causing a significant decrease in cyst weight and a high protoscolicidal effect.
side_effects: Chrysodium alienum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extract can lead to headaches, insomnia, and digestive issues in rare cases. In severe instances, improper use of the plant has been linked to increased heart rate, anxiety, and even respiratory problems. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these adverse reactions.
